headline: Seagate Technology Holdings Plc (STX) Poised for Robust Growth as a Top Tech Stock in Louis Navellier’s Portfolio
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings Plc (NASDAQ:STX) is one of the top tech stocks in Louis Navellier’s portfolio. On April 29, analysts at BofA Securities raised Seagate Technology Holdings Plc (NASDAQ:STX) price target to $840 from $700, while reiterating their Buy rating. The positive stance is in response to the company delivering fiscal third-quarter 2026 results that […]
